metadata.title:
URGE TRACTION CO.
To bU|LDL|NE TO


H|LLyARO

pages.raw_text:
Again has the matter of the Spo-
kane Traction Co. building line to
Hillyard come to the front, and this
time the business men of Hillyard
are behind the move.


A committee has been named to
see the Traction Co. heads and as
certain what can be done in the
matter. 1t is understood that the
committee has receivd some sub
stantial encouragement. Since the
Inland Empire system and its city
car lines, operated under the name
of the Spokane Traction Co., has
passed into the hands of J. J. Hill,
there has been a renewal OF the de-
mand that Hillyard be connected
with the city of Spokane by a Hill
carline.


If the line is built it will pass
through Lidgerwood and thence
east to Hillyard. 1t will give that
end of the city competing car ser
vice and afford people chance to
get to any part Of the town without
paying another fare.
